text_original: after a ~1000 messages the bots break. image and videos generation is awful too, but i don't use it anyway.
text_zh: 在大约 1000 条消息后，机器人就崩溃了。图片和视频生成也很糟糕，不过反正我也不用。
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience! After long chats, AI memory can sometimes hit a limit. We recently launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention. Please try the Pin feature to save key details. For the image issues, please email screenshots to support@fantachat.ai so we can fix it!
reply_zh: 你好，对于这次不愉快的使用体验，我深表歉意！在长时间对话后，AI 的记忆有时会达到上限。我们最近推出了全新的记忆服务升级，以提升长期记忆能力。请尝试使用“固定”（Pin）功能来保存关键细节。针对图片问题，请将截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们进行修复！
